name: nerq-trust
description: Check trust scores for any software, app, VPN, package, or crypto token. 7.5M+ entities across 26 registries. Free, no auth.

tools.name: preflight_check
tools.description: Get trust score and safety verdict for any software entity (app, VPN, npm package, website, game). 7.5M+ entities.

tools.name: best_in_category
tools.description: Get top entities in a category by trust score

tools.name: compare_agents
tools.description: Compare two or more entities on trust score, security, compliance, and popularity

agents.description: List of entity names to compare (2-5)

tools.name: kya_check_agent
tools.description: Know Your Agent — full due diligence check for any AI tool or software entity

tools.name: search_agents
tools.description: Search 5M+ AI assets including agents, tools, MCP servers, models, datasets, and packages

type.description: Filter by type: mcp_server, npm_package, pypi_package, etc.
